title: The Proud
actors: Giannis Voglis, Petros Fyssoun, Alexandra Ladikou, Dimitris Ioakeimidis
plot: In post-1821 Peloponnese, a humble farmhand dares to fall in love with the beautiful sister of the area's haughty landlord, only to trigger a dangerous cycle of unbridled violence. Can there be redemption for the proud ones?
